mysite
Table of Contents

Class ReservaDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Projection of a Reserva entity with denormalized client and space names.

public class ReservaDTO
Inheritance
object
ReservaDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

ClienteNombre and EspacioNombre are hydrated by ReservaService.ListarReservas to avoid extra lookups in the UI layer. Estado mirrors EstadoReserva as a string so the UI can display it without a reference to the Domain enum assembly.

Constructors

ReservaDTO() 

public ReservaDTO()

Properties

Adelanto

Advance payment amount collected at booking time.

public decimal Adelanto { get; set; }

Property Value

decimal

ClienteID

FK to the client who made the reservation.

public Guid ClienteID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

ClienteNombre

Full name of the client, hydrated from the repository.

public string ClienteNombre { get; set; }

Property Value

string

CodigoReserva

Human-readable reservation code (e.g., RES-000123).

public string CodigoReserva { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Duracion

Duration of the reservation in minutes.

public int Duracion { get; set; }

Property Value

int

EspacioID

FK to the reserved space.

public Guid EspacioID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

EspacioNombre

Display name of the space, hydrated from the repository.

public string EspacioNombre { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Estado

String representation of EstadoReserva (e.g., "Pendiente", "Pagada", "Cancelada").

public string Estado { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Fecha

Date portion of the reservation (date only, no time component).

public DateTime Fecha { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

FechaHora

Exact start date and time of the reservation.

public DateTime FechaHora { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Id

Primary key of the reservation.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid
